mechanism.triage_dispatch_separation: QualitySignal and failure_class are triage outputs; repair_family and tool are resolved through a static dispatch table.
mechanism.anti_overfit_statement: 所有阈值从当前源 PDF 的 bbox、字号和候选生成证据计算，不读取人工对照、不使用固定页码或固定文本。
